programName: Lead Service Line Replacement Reimbursement Program
subsidyType: up to 100 percent reimbursement based on income
publicSideCovered: not a separate public-side grant statement on the reimbursement page
privateSideCovered: yes via reimbursement or stipend pathway
incomeRules: income review determines 100 percent 75 percent 50 percent or stipend support
propertyRules: available to customers who replaced a private lead service line since January 2019
contractorRules: customer hires the plumber and submits reimbursement paperwork
